learning.title: Declarative satellite state is not evidence of active governance
learning.finding: The repo claimed Cerberus v0.5 satellite readiness in .agent_state.json, while active Git hooks still referenced v0.3/V0.02 and depended on a broken .protocol-core link.
learning.failure_mode: Security theater through stale local hooks and optimistic state metadata.
evidence: git status warns it cannot open .protocol-core

classification.reason_not_gs_yet: Single external repo observation; needs deduplication and a generalized detector proposal before GS promotion.

proposed_cerberus_guard.name: satellite_physical_governance_check
proposed_cerberus_guard.description: External Fase 0 should compare declared protocol state with physical hooks, paths, and executable entrypoints before trusting satellite claims.
